context.current_problem: proof assets exist but do not reliably convert

hypothesis: A proof-first landing section with a single hard CTA outperforms the current mixed-path offer block.
variant_b: Free roast -> $295 audit -> $499/mo install with proof and risk reversal
metric: stripe clicks / unique visitors and completed purchase rate

context.what_is_working: warm replies and specific proof beats abstract pitches

hypothesis: A same-day warm follow-up on engaged prospects will produce more responses than delayed batch follow-up.
variant_b: Reply within 2h with a specific context-based follow-up and one proof point

hypothesis: Counterintuitive hooks outperform generic founder-update posts for engagement and inbound curiosity.
variant_b: Counterintuitive claim tied to real numbers and one screenshot/proof point
metric: engagement rate and profile clicks within 24h
